---
title: "appendix"
author: "Nattamon Wattanapenpaiboon"
format: 
    html:
        theme: cerulean
    pdf: default
editor: visual   
---

## AI Acknowledgement

I used AI as a technical support and communication tool while completing this assignment.

Specifically, I used AI to:

- Explain R error messages: AI was used to diagnose specific errors encountered during the data filtering process, providing explanations that I then used to correct my code.
- Refine written conclusions: I used AI to help rephrase my conclusions drawn from the data analysis to ensure they were communicated in a professional and clear manner suitable for an academic report.

While AI assisted with these technical and linguistic elements, I made all analytical decisions. I have reviewed and tested all code to ensure its accuracy and take full responsibility for the final submission.

Link to prompts: <https://chatgpt.com/share/69c90df1-1cb0-8323-b4d8-5aa77df2701e>
